innateAbility.name: Weave
innateAbility.description: The Shadow Priest's invocations provide a dual-utility armor manipulation, simultaneously reducing armor if an enemy unit was affected, while increasing armor if an allied unit is affected.

abilities.name: Poison Touch
abilities.description: Releases a cone of poison that strike multiple enemy units.

abilities.name: Shallow Grave
abilities.description: Blesses an allied hero with Shallow Grave. The allied hero cannot die while under its protection, no matter how close to death.Grants bonus heal amplification corresponding to its health percentage.

abilities.name: Shadow Wave
abilities.description: Sends a wave of power that bounces between and heals all affected allied units.Shadow Wave always heals the Shadow Priest, without counting toward the number of bounces upon cast.

abilities.name: Nothl Projection
abilities.description: The Priest projects his Shadow in a short distance away, and stuns his own physical body for the duration.After the effect ends, the Shadow forcefully returns and applies a Strong Dispel onto the Priest.

abilities.name: End Projection
abilities.description: The Priest may prematurely end the Shadow projection after its min duration.
